description_long: This is a two-story brick hostel building situated on a street corner, featuring a flat roof with two large skylights and a prominent external metal fire escape. The facade is adorned with colorful graffiti murals and a large brown rolling shutter, while the ground floor includes a deli storefront with a blue awning. The side and rear walls are mostly plain concrete with additional graffiti, and the building has a utilitarian, urban appearance. Windows are symmetrically arranged on the upper floor, with simple rectangular frames and no decorative elements. The structure is robust, with visible rooftop ventilation and utility elements, and the sidewalk wraps around the building. The overall aesthetic is functional with some artistic urban touches, typical of mixed-use city neighborhoods.
description: A two-story brick hostel with graffiti, a deli storefront, and a metal fire escape, set on a street corner with a flat roof and urban details.
description_view_0: The side view shows the fire escape, colorful graffiti murals, and a mix of brick and concrete surfaces.
description_view_1: The front view highlights the deli storefront, brown rolling shutter, blue awning, and symmetrical upper windows.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a plain concrete wall with graffiti and rooftop utility elements, lacking windows or entrances.
description_view_3: The opposite side view reveals more graffiti, utility boxes, and a largely unadorned concrete wall.
attribute_signage: A blue awning with white 'DELI' text above the main entrance on the front facade; graffiti art and tags on the lower walls and side surfaces; no other formal signage visible.
attribute_entrance_design: The main entrance is located on the front facade beneath the blue 'DELI' awning, featuring a glass door with a metal frame, flanked by large storefront windows. The entrance is at sidewalk level with no visible steps or ramp, and the area is partially sheltered by the awning.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are symmetrically arranged on the upper floor of the front and side facades, rectangular in shape with simple frames, and evenly spaced. No windows are present on the rear or one side wall.
attribute_balcony_presence: One external metal fire escape balcony is present on the side facade, accessible from the upper floor, with black metal railings and stairs.
attribute_architectural_style: The building exhibits a utilitarian urban style with some contemporary influences, characterized by plain brickwork, flat roof, and minimal decorative elements, combined with street art and functional features like the fire escape.
